# Wait Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-wait
kind: Wait
spec:
  action: serviceActive
  name: containerd
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Wait
spec:
  action: fileExists
  path: /etc/kubernetes/admin.conf
  type: file
  nonEmpty: true
  interval: 2s
  timeout: 5m
```
